product_overview: QuantumShield is an async FastAPI backend providing internet-facing asset discovery, TLS/crypto inspection, CBOM generation, PQC posture scoring and migration planning with dashboards and exports. See the PRD images (pages 1–3 for executive summary & user journeys, page 6 for API surface) for visual diagrams and lists of routes.
core_goals: Discover internet-facing assets (subdomains/services) and run responsible TLS/crypto scans at scale with concurrency and batch limits.
Produce a Cryptographic Bill of Materials (CBOM) and analytics (charts, per-component lists) for visibility into algorithms, key lengths, CAs, and cipher usage.
Compute and expose quantum-readiness (quantum score / PQC posture) and simulate 'what-if' PQC adoption to guide migration planning.
Support portfolio workflows: batch scans, scan history/diff, deduplicated inventory, and asset metadata CRUD for prioritization.
Provide governance and reporting: exportable JSON bundles, migration roadmaps, org crypto policy CRUD, webhooks and audit history.
Secure access with JWT-style authentication and enforce admin-only operations for governance APIs; degrade gracefully when external tools or DB are unavailable.

features.name: Scanner API
features.description: Queue and manage asynchronous cryptographic scans (single and batch), observe live progress, and retrieve latest scan results, history and diffs per domain.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/scan with {domain, options} and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 202 with scan_id, domain, status -> Connect to WebSocket /api/v1/ws with token -> Receive progress events for scan_id -> GET /api/v1/results/{domain} with token -> Receive 200 with latest scan document (TLS, CBOM, quantum score)

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/scan/batch with {domains[]} and Authorization: Bearer <token> (within MAX_BATCH_DOMAINS) -> Receive 202 with batch_id, jobs -> Poll GET /api/v1/scans/history?domain=example.com with token -> Receive 200 with recent scans for domain

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/scan/batch with domains list exceeding MAX_BATCH_DOMAINS -> Receive 400 with error 'batch size exceeded' or similar validation error

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/scan with {domain} and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 202 with scan_id -> GET /api/v1/results/{domain} with token while MongoDB or pipeline unreachable -> Receive 503/500 with error 'database unavailable' or 'scan processing error'

features.name: CBOM & Crypto Dashboard
features.description: Provide CBOM summary, per-application/component lists enriched with threat/NIST context, chart data (key lengths, CAs, ciphers), and crypto/security rows for dashboard consumption.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/cbom/summary?domain=example.com with token -> Receive 200 with CBOM summary object -> GET /api/v1/cbom/per-app?domain=example.com with token -> Receive 200 with per-component array -> GET /api/v1/cbom/charts with token -> Receive 200 with chart data
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/crypto/security with token -> Receive 200 with TLS/crypto rows
GET /api/v1/cbom/summary without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/cbom/summary?domain=example.com with token while MongoDB is unreachable -> Receive 503/500 with error 'database error' or empty response / explanatory error

features.name: PQC Posture & Quantum Score
features.description: Expose asset-level PQC posture and enterprise-style quantum/cyber scores; allow heuristic 'what-if' simulations for PQC migration scenarios.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/pqc/posture?domain=example.com with token -> Receive 200 with asset-level PQC posture object
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/cyber-rating with token -> Receive 200 with enterprise-style cyber rating and per-endpoint contributions

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/quantum-score/simulate with {assumptions} and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with projected quantum score object and simulation disclaimer
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/quantum-score/simulate with malformed assumptions -> Receive 400 with validation error

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/pqc/posture?domain=example.com with token when no completed scans exist -> Receive 404 or 200 with empty posture and message 'no completed scans'

features.name: Portfolio & Inventory
features.description: Provide deduplicated inventory across completed scans and allow upsert (CRUD) of host metadata such as owner, environment, and criticality.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/inventory/summary with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with deduplicated hosts and optional metadata overlay

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PUT /api/v1/assets/metadata with {host, owner, environment, criticality} and token -> Receive 200 with upserted asset metadata
PUT /api/v1/assets/metadata without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PUT /api/v1/assets/metadata with invalid schema (missing host) -> Receive 400 with validation error

features.name: Reporting & Threat Model
features.description: Export structured JSON bundles for audits (CBOM, TLS, scores), produce migration roadmaps and threat-model summaries with NIST catalog references for reporting.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/reports/export-bundle?domain=example.com with token -> Receive 200 with export JSON bundle containing CBOM, TLS, and scores
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/migration/roadmap with token -> Receive 200 with phased waves and prioritized backlog
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/threat-model/summary with token -> Receive 200 with Shor/Grover/HNDL context and NIST PQC reference URLs
GET /api/v1/reports/export-bundle without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Admin Phase 4
features.description: Organization-level crypto policy CRUD, integration settings (webhooks) masked on read, and export/audit history retrieval; admin-only operations enforce admin role.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token containing admin role -> GET /api/v1/admin/policy with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with org policy object
POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token containing admin role -> PUT /api/v1/admin/policy with updated policy and token -> Receive 200 with updated policy
POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/admin/exports/history with token -> Receive 200 with export audit events
POST /api/v1/auth/login with non-admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token (no admin role) -> PUT /api/v1/admin/policy with token -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Migration Phase 5
features.description: Manage migration tasks and waivers lifecycle (list/create) and seed tasks from backlog to drive remediation execution planning.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/migration/tasks with token -> Receive 200 with list of migration tasks
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/migration/tasks with {title, domain, priority} and token -> Receive 200 with created task object
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/v1/migration/waivers with token -> Receive 200 with list of waivers
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/v1/migration/tasks with invalid payload -> Receive 400 validation error

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Demo login endpoint issues a JWT-style bearer token used to authenticate subsequent protected API requests; admin role is present in concept and enforced on admin endpoints.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid username/email and password -> Receive 200 with {token, user, roles} where token is a JWT-style bearer token
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error 'invalid credentials'

features.name: Scanner API
features.description: Async cryptographic scan pipeline, batch scans, WebSocket updates, results by domain.

endpoints.description: Queue a full asynchronous scan for a domain
Queue portfolio scans for multiple domains
Latest scan document for a domain

depends_on: External recon tools (subfinder, etc.) on host

features.name: CBOM & Crypto Dashboard
features.description: CBOM summary, charts, per-app components, crypto security table.

endpoints.description: Chart data for key lengths, CAs, ciphers

features.name: PQC Posture & Quantum Score
features.description: PQC posture, vulnerable algorithms, cyber rating, what-if simulation.

endpoints.description: Asset-level PQC posture from latest scan

features.name: Reporting & Threat Model
features.description: JSON export bundle, migration roadmap, threat summary, NIST catalog.

features.name: Admin Phase 4
features.description: Org crypto policy, integrations webhooks, export audit log.

features.name: Migration Phase 5
features.description: Migration tasks and waivers CRUD; seed from backlog.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Demo login returning JWT-style bearer for dashboard API.

known_limitations.issue: MongoDB must be reachable at startup; /health may still return healthy while DB ops fail if misconfigured
known_limitations.impact: API routes depending on get_database() fail without MongoDB

known_limitations.issue: Full scan pipeline depends on external CLI tools and network access to targets
known_limitations.impact: Scans may timeout or return partial results in restricted environments
